title: SCPN Control: Neuro-Symbolic Stochastic Petri Net Controller for Plasma Control
description: Standalone neuro-symbolic control engine that compiles Stochastic Petri Nets into spiking neural network controllers with formal verification guarantees. Features JAX-accelerated transport and neural equilibrium (GPU + autodiff), real-time adaptive Kuramoto coupling, Lyapunov stability guard, H-infinity observer, and WebSocket phase streaming. 50 Python modules, 5 Rust crates, 2100+ tests.
notes: Part of the SCPN (Self-Consistent Phenomenological Network) research framework by ANULUM. v0.12.0: QLKNN-10D trained neural transport model, auto-discovered weights, training script with reproducibility, 20 QLKNN-specific tests.
